meta_description: As a digital manufacturing platform, Protolabs Network gives engineers access to manufacturing technologies provided by partners around the world. Find out what digital manufacturing is all about and how it helps companies to streamline their supply chains.

sections.heading: What is digital manufacturing?
sections.text: What is digital manufacturing? As a digital manufacturing platform, Protolabs Network gives engineers access to manufacturing technologies provided by partners around the world. Find out what digital manufacturing is all about and how it helps companies to streamline their supply chains.

sections.heading: Defining digital manufacturing
sections.text: Defining digital manufacturing Digital manufacturing refers to the integration of digital technologies into manufacturing processes. The rise of Industry 4.0 â which revolves around technological developments in the manufacturing industry â has increased the importance of digital manufacturing, giving it a key role in developing more connected, efficient, and automated manufacturing processes.Â Â Essentially any industry can benefit from digital manufacturing, as it looks to streamline and optimize the entire manufacturing process â no matter what types of parts and products it deals with. How does digital manufacturing work? Manufacturing can be digitalized using technologies that de...
